description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees. The structure features a dark, likely shingled, hip roof with a central raised section, possibly for skylights or ventilation. The front facade is defined by a covered entryway and a symmetrical arrangement of windows, while the sides and rear include additional windows and a driveway leading to a garage. The property is bordered by a paved area, suggesting a driveway or parking space, and a well-maintained lawn on one side. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, possibly stucco or painted concrete, with clear demarcation of the roofline and eaves. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions, emphasizing horizontal lines and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a covered entry and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped greenery along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and a large lawn area adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, backyard landscaping, and the full extent of the roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible greenery, paved area, and a clear view of the building's side elevation.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
